text: I've been trying to schedule an appointment for the past 30 minutes. I just tried to book an appointment for tomorrow with Dr. Alice. The booking form looked normal so I selected the doctor, picked tomorrow at 09:00 and confirmed. The page reloaded but the appointment never appeared in my appointments list. I tried again two more times and now I have no idea whether multiple appointments were created or none at all. This seems like the booking system is not recording appointments correctly.

This is urgent: something is seriously wrong with payments right now. I completed payment and the success page appeared, but when I clicked 'View My Appointments' there is no appointment there. My bank shows the charge already. This means the system is taking payments but not creating bookings.

Multiple family members are having the same issue. I attempted to book an appointment four times in a row and each time the confirm button simply reloads the booking page. There is no error message and no appointment appears in my account. It looks like booking is completely broken.

This is extremely concerning. When I logged into my account today I briefly saw another person's appointment in my list, including the doctor's name and the time. After refreshing the page it disappeared. That should absolutely not be possible. Could someone from the technical team please investigate?
I need to book something for tomorrow. The booking page seems completely unusable right now. Every time I try to confirm a new appointment it just reloads the page without creating anything.

Neither I nor my spouse can load the booking page. I tried booking on two different browsers and both show the same problem where the booking confirmation never happens. This looks like the entire booking system might be down.

I assumed I might have done something wrong, so I tried again three more times with the same result. At this point it looks like the system is simply not recording bookings at all.
